mai-tai-cocktail.name: Mai Tai Cocktail
instructions: Fill an old-fashioned glass with 1 cup crushed ice. Set aside in the freezer.
Combine light rum, gold rum, orange Curacao, orgeat, and lime juice in a cocktail shaker. Add 1 cup ice, cover and shake until chilled. Strain into the chilled old-fashioned glass. Top with dark rum.
Garnish with a wedge of pineapple and a maraschino cherry.

make-a-delicious-pappardelle-with-aspara.name: Make A Delicious Pappardelle With Asparagus And Goat Cheese
make-a-delicious-pappardelle-with-aspara.original_name: Haz un delicioso pappardelle con espárragos y queso de cabra

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pappardelle fresco o seco
120 gr de queso de cabra cremoso
2 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra )
80 ml de crema de leche para cocinar
30 gr de nueces tostadas y troceadas  ( (opcional, para aportar textura))
Hojas de albahaca fresca o menta para decorar

instructions: Wash the asparagus and cut the hard part of the stem. Reserve whole tipples and cut the rest into 3 cm pieces.
Take a big pot with water and salt to its boiling. Cook papardelle dough as instructed by the package, saving a cup of cooking water before draining.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Fry garlic for 1 minute, preventing it from burning.
Add the asparagus and leap for 3-4 minutes till they are tender but still crispy.
Incorpora el vino blanco y deja reducir durante 2 minutos para concentrar el sabor.
Baja el fuego, agrega la crema de leche y el queso de cabra, removiendo hasta obtener una salsa suave.
Add lime and rectify salt and pepper.
Incorporates the dough into the frying pan with some cooking water to get the sauce. Gently mix till every papardelle tape is covered.
Sirve caliente, decorando con las nueces tostadas y hojas frescas de albahaca o menta.

make-this-tropical-fruit-smoothie-comede.name: Make This Tropical Fruit Smoothie
make-this-tropical-fruit-smoothie-comede.original_name: Haz este batido de frutas tropicales

ingredients.item: 120 ml de jugo de naranja natural

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, lavando nuestras frutas.
We'll have pineapple and pineapple and cut them into medium cubes. Do the same with the papaya or milky and the mango.
Peel the cambur or banana and you'll cut them into slices as well.
In the case of the maracujah, you'll cut her half and get his pulp out.
Take your blender or processor and you'll have all the ingredients added. Including fruit and natural orange juice.
Add the ice to your taste and some sugar.
Loan till everything's well-processed and have a super beatfight. Test her to see if she's missing sugar.
Serve them in a glass, decorate them with some glove and enjoy them.

mandarin-liqueur-madarinchello-argiro.name: Mandarin Liqueur (madarinchello)
instructions: We choose mandarins ripe and tight, without blows and wash them very well.
We drill them many times with a fork around.
Stab 1 nut in each mandarin, place them in a jar that closes airtightly.
We cover them with cognac. Close the jar and let them stay for at least 3 weeks.
After 3 weeks we make sugar syrup with water, building it for 3’-4’.
Let it cool well.
Drain the alcohol from the tangerines and combine it with the cold syrup.
Finally, drizzle the liqueur into a fine set and place it in a bottle that closes well (glass).
Leave it for 2 weeks. Then freeze and serve.
Read all my secrets to choose, clean and maintain citrus fruits properly!
With the tangerines you used for the tangerine liqueur, make sweet tangerine.

mango-orange-slush.name: Mango Orange Slush
instructions: Blend mango, ice, orange juice, water, lime juice, ginger juice, and brown sugar together in a blender until slushy, 2 to 3 minutes.

mango-lime-curd.name: Mango-lime Curd

ingredients.prep: peeled, flesh cut away from pit

instructions: Process mango in a food processor until smooth.
Transfer to a medium saucepan and whisk in lime juice, salt, and ½ cup sugar.
Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean and add pod.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Meanwhile, whisk egg yolks, egg, and remaining ¼ cup sugar in a medium bowl until no longer grainy and slightly lightened in color, about 2 minutes.
Whisking constantly, very gradually stream about half of hot mango mixture into eggs, then gradually whisk mixture back into saucepan.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until curd thickens and whisk leaves a visible trail, 5–7 minutes (do not let it boil).
Remove from heat and add butter a couple of pieces at a time, whisking until incorporated before adding more.
Strain curd through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass bowl or nonreactive bowl and cover, pressing plastic wrap directly onto surface.
Chill until cold, at least 2 hours.

maple-syrup-glazed-pork-loin-recipe-come.name: Maple Syrup Glazed Pork Loin Recipe
maple-syrup-glazed-pork-loin-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de lomo de cerdo glaseado con sirope de arce

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de sirope de arce puro

instructions: En un bol, mezcla el sirope de arce, la mostaza Dijon, la salsa de soja, el ajo picado, el jengibre rallado y el vinagre de manzana y reserva.
It purifies the oven at 190 and 3 and (191 and 3). Rub his pork back with olive oil, salt and black pepper.
In a large frying pan, dors the pork's back with medium-high heat till it's golden from all sides (about 3 minutes and about).
Coloca el lomo en una bandeja para hornear y verte el glaseado de sirope de arce por encima. Cubre con papel aluminio y hornea durante 25-30 minutos.

Once the minutes have been passed, remove the paper with an additional 15-20 minutes with an occasional spray with the frying of the plate, until the loin reaches an internal temperature of 63 and 3 and the frying is caramelized.
Deja reposar el lomo durante 10 minutos antes de cortarlo en rodajas finas.

marmalade-ham-cheese-and-arugula-sandwic.name: Marmalade Ham, Cheese, And Arugula Sandwich

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Slice the baguette down the middle lengthways, leaving one edge still attached so you can open it like a hinge. Butter the top and bottom of the soft bread inside, then spread mustard on the top half and marmalade on the bottom half. Fold the ham and push in, then top with the cheese and arugula. Season and close the sandwich, gently squeezing it together as you slice it in half.

masala-egg-curry.name: Masala Egg Curry
instructions: Heat avocado oil in a pan, and saute onions until translucent.
Add tomatoes and saute until soft. Then, add garlic, ginger, spices and water. Mix and let simmer for approximately 5 minutes.
Gently place the boiled egg halves into the gravy and simmer on low heat for approximately 5 min.
To serve, garnish with a sprig of cilantro and a sprinkle of garam masala.

meatless-monday-lasagna.name: Meatless Monday Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook lasagna noodles in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water. Toss with 1 tablespoon olive oil to prevent sticking and add flavor.
Meanwhile, mix 2 cups mozzarella, ricotta, 1/2 cup Parmesan, tofu, and eggs together in a bowl. Combine remaining mozzarella and Parmesan in a smaller bowl.

While the noodles are cooking, heat remaining tablespoons olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add carrots, zucchini, onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms; saute until tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Add pasta sauce and spinach; simmer until sauce is heated through and spinach is wilted, about 3 minutes.

Cover the bottom of a 2-quart rectangular baking dish with a little of the vegetable sauce and arrange 1/2 of the lasagna noodles, overlapping slightly, over top. Layer with 1/2 of the cheese-tofu mixture over noodles and 1/2 of the remaining sauce. Repeat layers with remaining noodles, cheese-tofu mixture, and sauce. Top with mozzarella-Parmesan mixture.
Bake, covered, in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Uncover and bake until bubbly, about 20 minutes more. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing into 8 large squares and serving.

meatloaf-wellington.name: Meatloaf Wellington
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion; cook and stir until softened, about 5 minutes.
Beat 1 egg in a large bowl until foamy. Add onion, ground beef, bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, and garlic; mix until combined. Mold mixture into a loaf on a baking sheet.
Unroll crescent rolls and use to cover meatloaf completely, seaming seals and perforations so that no meat is visible.
Whisk remaining egg and water in a small bowl to make egg wash. Brush egg wash over crust.
Bake meatloaf in the preheated oven until crust is very dark and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads at least 71°C (70 degrees C), about 45 minutes.

melon-cream-puff-pastry-lezzet.name: Melon Cream Puff Pastry
instructions: 1. Wait for the rubbish dough from the ice.
2. Set the oily paper-series oven tray and wrap a egg into their uniforms.
3. Celery up to 10 minutes until they are angry.
4. Leave it from the oven and cool.
5. Extract flour and corn starch and blend in a bowl.
6. Make your roam with fork into ezip pure.
7. Heat milk, cream and a tablespoon of sugar in the pot.
8. Rub the remaining sugar and egg yolks in the mixer up to two muzzles in a separate container.
9. In addition to the unlu mixture 1-2 minutes more whip.
10. Continue to whip the creamy mixture with heated milk by adding azar azar.
11. 11. Cook the unlu mixture to the pot and until it comes to the jealous fire consistency.
12. Add the porridge of the heart for five minutes to the stroke.
12. August Boil a stone more and leave it from the stove and cool.
14 July To avoid slipping of the crepe, rub it with the intermediate row mixer.
15. Directory of milföy dough that you have already fried into the serving plate.
16. Take a creamy mix to them.
17. September Decorate and serve with prepared chocolate sauce, legume and antep nuts.

mexican-chorizo-breakfast-pie.name: Mexican Chorizo Breakfast Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch pie pan.
Combine hash browns, 1 egg, minced onion, flour, and salt in a bowl. Pour into the prepared pie pan and smooth down to form a crust.

Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Brush the crust with olive oil and continue to bake until golden and set, about 10 minutes more. Remove from the oven and reduce temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir chorizo in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Add chopped onion and garlic and saute for another 3 minutes. Remove any extra grease from the pan if desired.
Beat remaining eggs and milk together in a bowl until smooth; add cilantro and cumin.
Spread half of the Monterey Jack cheese onto the potato crust. Spoon chorizo mixture over and top with remaining Monterey Jack cheese. Pour egg mixture over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until eggs are set and the top of the pie is slightly browned, 35 to 40 minutes. Serve warm.

milk-free-semolina-halva-lezzet.name: Milk-free Semolina Halva
instructions: 1. Add dust sugar and water to a large container.
2. Mix materials until sugar is melted.
3. After adding the mixture to the interior to the vanilla, and wait on a edge.
4. Take the i&ccedil of the ceiling, and roast to about 15 minutes of irmixes.
5. When the amphitheaters are put on the edge, you can expect the gratitude of the semolinas u from the pour and mix for 10 minutes.
6. You can get to the bowls of the service when the amplifier &ccedil says.
7. If you wish, you can service the milkless irmic helvasini vanilla ice cream.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

milky-sweet-fritters.name: Milky Sweet Fritters
instructions: Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Stir in milk and condensed milk until smooth.
Spoon batter into the hot oil and deep-fry until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.

mincemeat-spice-cake.name: Mincemeat Spice Cake

ingredients.item: Crosse & blackwell® mincemeat filling & topping or crosse & blackwell® rum & brandy mincemeat filling & topping

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Line bottom of springform cake pan with wax paper and butter the sides.

Place flour, baking powder, sugar and 1/2 cup butter in large bowl. Stir in milk, mincemeat, eggs and lemon peel. Mix on low speed of electric mixer 2 minutes or until thoroughly combined. Pour into prepared pan.

Bake 30 minutes. While cake is baking, mix all topping ingredients in small bowl. Remove cake from oven and spoon on topping. Return cake to oven and bake an additional 30 minutes or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.

mini-raspberry-cheesecake-teleculinaria.name: Mini Raspberry Cheesecake
instructions: To the base, crush the biscuits in a chipper and add the melted butter. Shake until you get a wet sand consistency. Divide by the rims or silicone molds and press the bottom.

Crush the raspberries until you get a purée and book. Beat the cream cheese to make it more creamy and then add the condensed milk. Place the gelatin leaves in cold water and then dissolve the gelatin leaves into 70 g of hot cream and add to the previous preparation. Finally, whip cream into whipped cream and wrap.

Divide the prepared into two parts and add the raspberry puree into one. Place the white cream in the forms first and then the pink cream. Take it cold for at least four hours. Decorate with raspberries and mint leaves and serve.

mining-enchiladas-recipe-comedera.name: Mining Enchiladas Recipe

ingredients.item: 283 grs. de papas picadas en cubos y cocidas
283 grs.  de zanahoria picada en cubos y cocida

instructions: Remoja los chiles guajillos en un recipiente con agua caliente hasta que se suavicen.
Once they are soft, remove them from the broth, open them and scrape them to leave them very clear.
Put in the glass of the blender the chilies previously soaked and devoured, garlic, water soaking, oregano, cumin and salt.
Licua bien hasta que los ingredientes se integren y obtengas una mezcla tersa.
In a frying pan with medium high heat, put oil and pour the potatoes with carrots and salt with them to sigh for 5 minutes or till they are a little golden. Reserve as soon as they're ready.
En una olla a fuego medio, agrega la mezcla de los chiles y calienta hasta que hierva. Reserva.
To start assembling enchiladas, heat up a frying pan with medium heat and melt pork butter.
Once hot, sink the tortillas into the Red Salsa on both sides and put them onto the frying pan to cook them on both sides for 1 minute or until they are partially golden on both sides.
Reserve and repeat with other tortillas.
To put the plate together, take an omelette and fill with ranch cheese, fold half and repeat with two more omeletes.
Serve and join them with the potato and frying carrot and more cheese and avocado cuts.

miso-macaroni-and-cheese.name: Miso Macaroni And Cheese

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Cook 12 oz. conchigliette (small shells) in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid (do not rinse pasta). Spread pasta out on a rimmed baking sheet and set aside.

Whisk 3 cups whole milk, 2 Tbsp. white miso, 1 tsp. garlic powder, ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes in a small saucepan to combine, then bring to a simmer over medium-high heat.

Meanwhile, melt 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a large pot over medium-low heat. Sprinkle ½ cup (63 g) all-purpose flour over and cook, whisking constantly, until combined and mixture is foaming but still very pale, about 4 minutes.

Whisking constantly to prevent lumps from forming, very gradually pour in 1¼ cups hot milk mixture, then cook, still whisking constantly, until smooth. Add remaining milk mixture and whisk again until smooth. Add 8 oz. sharp yellow cheddar, coarsely grated, and ½ cup pasta cooking liquid and cook, whisking, until cheese is melted and sauce is smooth once more. Add reserved pasta and stir, adding more pasta cooking liquid to loosen sauce if needed, until pasta is well coated.
Transfer macaroni and cheese to a large shallow bowl or dish and sprinkle with more crushed red pepper flakes.

mock-chopped-liver.name: Mock Chopped Liver
instructions: Place water, lentils, and bouillon cubes in a pot; cover and simmer over medium heat until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain well.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat; add onion and sauté until soft and translucent.
Blend cooked lentils, onions, and walnuts in a food processor until it reaches the desired consistency for pâté. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Chill before serving.

moist-almond-tart-teleculinaria.name: Moist Almond Tart
instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. A slightly almond tower in the oven. Put on a pie and butter and book it.

In a bowl, beat 75 g of butter with 150 g of sugar. Add the eggs and the lemon zest and stir. Wipe the yeast with the flour and gradually add to the previous preparation, mixing well. Lie in shape and put it in the oven for about 15 minutes.
In a tachinho, pour the remaining butter, milk and sugar, take it to the fire and stir until you get a syrup. Add the almond and stir some more.
Remove the pie from the oven, dispose of the almond preparation on top and take it back to the oven until the almond is coloured. Take it off, let it cool, unshape it and serve it.

moist-banana-streusel-muffins.name: Moist Banana Streusel Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spray 10 muffin cups with cooking spray.

Whisk 1 1/2 cups sifted whole wheat flour with baking soda, baking powder, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon in a large bowl. Mix together mashed bananas, 1/2 cup melted unsalted butter, egg, white sugar, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl. Gently fold banana mixture into dry ingredients just until moistened; do not overmix. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.

Mix dark brown sugar with 2 tablespoons whole wheat flour and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl, stirring until combined; mash 1 tablespoon unsalted butter into the mixture with a fork until streusel topping resembles crumbs. Sprinkle topping over muffins.
Bake muffins in the preheated oven until a toothpick comes out clean or with moist crumbs, about 20 minutes.

molotof-tart-teleculinaria.name: Molotof Tart

ingredients.item: 1/2 lata  leite condensado com cacau ((200 g))

instructions: Unroll the leafy dough and place it in a large tart (about 25 cm in diameter), keeping underneath the paper that surrounds it. Stitch the bottom with a fork and bring it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 15 minutes. Remove it from the oven and let it cool off a little.
Beat the clears in castle with the sugar and the lemon zest. Lay on the tart lined with the dough and put it back in the oven for about 15 minutes.
After the specified time, turn off the oven and leave inside for another 10 minutes. Disform, cover with cocoa condensed milk and sprinkle with broken pistachios.
If you do not find cocoa condensed milk, you can use the same measure of normal condensed milk and add 1 spoon of cocoa.

monkey-bread-kabobs.name: Monkey Bread Kabobs
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line three baking sheets and three cooling racks with parchment paper.
Mix white sugar, brown sugar, and cinnamon together in a large resealable bag.
Cut each biscuit into four pieces. Dip each biscuit piece in melted butter; transfer to sugar mixture. Gently shake bag to coat biscuits in sugar mixture.

Thread three biscuit pieces onto a skewer; add a maraschino cherry. Repeat with three more biscuit pieces, ending with a maraschino cherry. Repeat with remaining ingredients to make 20 kabobs. Arrange kabobs on the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits are cooked through, about 15 minutes. Flip kabobs halfway through cooking.
Transfer kabobs to prepared wire racks and let cool.
